text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking through the shopping district one
afternoon with Yaeno Muteki...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The food is supposedly excellent, but it's the
size of the portions that gets the most attention.
That, and I hear they have an unusual system...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Incredible—the Grand Portion Placement Test! It
looks like you're given a rank based on how much
you manage to eat!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I see. So if I consume this amount, I'll be rank
ten... There's even a certification to become a
grand master.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's a truly incredible amount of food, but the
thought of being recognized has my body tingling
with excitement. Would you mind if I try my hand
at it?
choice_data_list: Food should be consumed in moderation.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Of course, you're right. Meals are not meant to
be a measure of strength.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm intrigued by the ranking system, but... right,
I'll show restraint!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I successfully prevent Yaeno Muteki from
overeating.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Osu! No matter the endeavor, there are certain
things that will only avail themselves to you upon
mastery.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
In an effort to open new doors, I shall take on this
challenge!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon afterwards, Yaeno Muteki breaks through
the limits of her stomach and is successfully
certified as a "master gourmet."
